description: Minute fragment from the bottom part of a legal deed written by Halfon b. Menashshe Halevi under the authority of Masliah Gaon, with a partial reshut clause visible. Dating: 1127–1138 CE, based on the latter's years of service and Halfon's scribal career.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
